common.privacyNotice: Your data stays on this device. We don't track your identity.

chat.initialMessage: Hi! I'm here to help you with any questions about sexual and reproductive health. Everything we discuss is private and confidential. What would you like to know?
chat.consultantMessage: Hi! I'm a Room 1221 consultant. I'm here to provide personalized support and guidance on sexual and reproductive health matters. Your conversation is completely private and confidential. How can I help you today?
chat.clearChatDesc: Are you sure? This will delete all messages on this device.
chat.logoutDesc: This will reset all your settings and clear your data from this device.

settings.title: Settings
settings.chooseRetention: Choose how long to keep your chats
settings.analyticsDesc: Share anonymous usage data to help us improve.

nickname.title: Welcome to Room 1221
nickname.desc: A safe, anonymous space for SRHR support. Set a nickname to personalize your experience, or chat anonymously.
nickname.label: Nickname (optional)
nickname.privacy: Your privacy is our priority. We never collect personal information or store identifying data.

list.myth: You cannot get pregnant the first time you have sex
list.fact: This is FALSE. Pregnancy can occur any time you have unprotected sex, including the first time.

list.title: The Party
list.scenario: Sarah's friend invites her to a party where there will be alcohol. What should Sarah do?
feedback: Correct! Always consult a trusted adult.

support.title: Support & Clinics
support.subtitle: Get help and find youth-friendly services

legal.title: Important Legal Information
legal.age: Age of consent in Ghana: 16 years
legal.desc: Any sexual activity with someone under 16 is illegal. Please contact authorities if needed.

emergency.text: Call 191 for Police or 193 for Ambulance immediately.

hotlines.description: For domestic violence and sexual assault cases.

pharmacy.title: Pharmacy & Products
pharmacy.subtitle: Order SRH medications and products safely

followUp.title: Your Follow-up ID
followUp.desc: Save this ID to continue your conversation later on any of our channels.
followUp.note: Important: This ID works across Web, WhatsApp, and Telegram.
